scores.correctness_notes: Core concepts correct (changes/tasks model, state persistence, CLI commands, ready boolean). Missing significant gold standard content: REST API endpoints (GET /v1/changes/{id}, /wait endpoint, ?select= filtering) and the change-update notices mechanism.
scores.hallucination_notes: container.get_change(change.id) is likely not a real ops Container method — the pebble client may have this but not Container directly. container.start_services(..., timeout=0) returning a Change object and the timeout=0 non-blocking behavior appear fabricated. PEBBLE_PERSIST=never is not in gold standard and likely hallucinated. Minor inaccuracies in the Python ops section.
